name: Puteri Gantian
overview:
"You want me to marry an old disabled man in place of my sister?"

After her father remarried, she's forced to take her sister's place and marry a rich, disabled heir—rumored to be old, ugly, and useless. But at their first meeting, she realizes he might not be the man everyone says he is... As misunderstandings pile up, their fragile relationship begins to crack. How long can a marriage built on money and lies really last?
